positive: A stylized, abstract illustration of a mystical forest scene at dusk. The composition features a strong central archway formed by intertwining bioluminescent branches and roots, leading into a softly glowing mist. On either side, silhouetted, oversized stylized flora (ferns, moss, glowing mushrooms) frame the scene. Color palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, electric teals, emerald greens, and touches of soft magenta light emanating from unseen sources. The style should be neo-art nouveau meets mystic psychedelic pop art, optimized for high-contrast textile printing. Clean lines, vector aesthetic, perfect symmetry, high detail, centered composition.
